candidate_problem_record.subject: math
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: 若 $x, y$ 满足 $\left\{\begin{array}{l}x-y+3 \geq 0, \\ x+y+1 \geq 0, \\ x \leq k,\end{array}\right.$
